name: Naked Pantree Brand Palette
description: Source of truth for Naked Pantree brand colors. See DESIGN_GUIDELINES.md §6 for usage rules.

forestGreen.role: Primary brand. App icon background, headers, key CTAs.
forestGreen.notes: Hero color. Do not substitute another green.

warmCream.role: App background, cards, the pantry cabinet in the icon.
warmCream.notes: Pure white is reserved for elevated surfaces (modals over cream).

coolBlue.notes: Reserved for cold storage. Not a generic link or button color.

rules.accessibility: All production text/background pairings must meet WCAG AA.
rules.stateCommunication: Never communicate state with color alone. Always pair with an icon or label.
